09cf03e13c41.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
09cf03e13c41.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
09cf03e13c41.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

719922ab9770.title: Close the hygiene gap — 2 to 5
719922ab9770.description: An FSA rating of 2 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
719922ab9770.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

3afbfbd17327.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
3afbfbd17327.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

6413c068b9c2.title: Ranked #9 of 9 locally — peers are ahead
6413c068b9c2.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

cf32acf38d3a.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
cf32acf38d3a.description: You trail peers by 2.9 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

a609d0b8d7d2.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
a609d0b8d7d2.description: You trail peers by 2.8 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
